actions.name: Channel Divinity
actions.description: Use a Channel Divinity option. 2 uses per Short Rest.

actions.description: Channel Divinity: Each undead within 30 ft that fails a WIS save is turned for 1 minute. Destroyed at CR 1.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.description: 1d12 slashing damage

actions.name: Rage
actions.description: Enter a rage. Advantage on STR checks/saves, resistance to B/P/S damage, +2 melee damage. 3 rages per long rest.

actions.name: Reckless Attack
actions.description: On your first attack, choose to attack with advantage. If you do, enemies have advantage against you until your next turn.

actions.name: Danger Sense
actions.description: Advantage on DEX saves against effects you can see (traps, spells).

actions.name: Extra Attack
actions.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.description: 1d6 piercing damage

actions.name: Sneak Attack (5d6)
actions.description: Once per turn, deal extra 5d6 damage if you have advantage or an ally adjacent to the target.

actions.name: Cunning Action
actions.description: Bonus Action. Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

actions.name: Uncanny Dodge
actions.description: Reaction: Halve the damage of an attack that hits you from an attacker you can see.

actions.name: Evasion
actions.description: On DEX save with half damage: success = no damage, failure = half damage.

actions.name: Quarterstaff
actions.description: 1d6 bludgeoning damage

actions.name: Wild Shape
actions.description: Bonus Action (2024). Transform into a CR-appropriate Beast. Keep mental stats; replace physical stats.
